name: hudi
explanation: Hudi is a JMX integration: the spec only references `init_config/jmx` and `instances/jmx`, the integration ships a `metrics.yaml` MBean list, and there is no Python check (only an `__init__.py` re-exporting the version). JMXFetch is dispatched against a Spark / Flink / standalone Hudi JVM that the user must expose with `-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.*` flags. JMX RMI ports are not standardised across Hudi deployments and production JMX endpoints almost always require `user` / `password` plus possibly a key/trust store. By the JMXFetch rule (pattern D / shortcut), this is impossible.
notes: JMX integration with no service-side check.py; classified per the standard JMX-impossible rule.
